# chat2api Upstream Metadata

- Upstream repository: `https://github.com/lanqian528/chat2api`
- Vendored into this repository on: `2026-04-05`
- Upstream commit: `a63a90cec90dea3fea3e272d22f8c5799de14e30`
- Vendored path: `third_party/chat2api`

## Notes

- This directory preserves the upstream project layout as closely as possible.
- The upstream `.git` directory is intentionally omitted.
- Local CLIProxyAPI-specific changes should stay inside this vendored copy unless there is a clear integration reason to modify the Go application outside it.
